message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Beregning af BMI

actor bruger
boundary "index.jsp" as index
boundary "resultat.jsp" as resultat

box "BmiUtil"
participant Initializer
end box

box "PresentationLayer"
participant FrontController
participant Command
participant Resultat as ResObj
end box

box "LogicFacade"
participant LogicFacade
end box

box "DBAccess"
participant BmiMapper
end box

database BmiDB

== Initialization ==

bruger -> index : 1 start
index -> Initializer : 2 getSportList()
index <-- Initializer : 3 ArrayList<Sport>

== Beregn BMI ==

bruger -> FrontController : 4 doPost()
FrontController -> FrontController : 5 processRequest()
FrontController -> ResObj : 6 from()
FrontController <-- ResObj : 7 Resultat
FrontController -> Command : 8 execute()
Command -> LogicFacade : 9 insertBmiItem()
LogicFacade -> BmiMapper : 10 insertBmiItem()
BmiMapper -> BmiDB : 11 executeQuery()
BmiMapper <-- BmiDB : 12 OK
LogicFacade <-- BmiMapper : 13 OK
Command <-- LogicFacade : 14 OK
FrontController <-- Command : 15 resultat
resultat <-- FrontController : 16 forward()

@enduml
```
